results.title: Overlay repro: VS Code paints under the native titlebar
results.detail: Explicit FLEET_MACOS_TITLEBAR_STYLE=overlay allows the child VS Code webview to occupy the titlebar strip. This is the mode that moved the phantom strip when the editor webview crop was changed.
results.rationale: Keep this capture as the known-bad comparison for stale tab/titlebar fragments caused by AppKit/WebKit child-view layering.

results.title: Default fixed path: transparent titlebar keeps VS Code below native chrome
results.detail: The rebuilt app logs titlebar_style=Transparent and the direct Fleet-window capture shows VS Code starting below the native titlebar, with no content-under-titlebar strip.
results.rationale: Fleet defaults to Tauri TitleBarStyle::Transparent on macOS because Tauri documents Overlay as content-over-titlebar behavior with caveats; Fleet does not need the VS Code webview under AppKit chrome.
